calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (418 Ramsell St., San Francisco)
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Betty Jane Orvell for the Petitioner.

The sale was confirmed at $535,000.00. No additional bond is required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Betty Orvell for and with Barbara Wilson (Petitioner).

The Court granted the petition appointing IMT Associates as the Administrator of the estate of Timothy M. Blake with full authority. The bond is set at $855,000.00. The order was signed in open court.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-29-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Tom Virsik appearing for and with Thomas Blake. Stacy Nelson appearing for objector. Oral arguments presented by both counsel. Both counsel agreed that there is a need for someone to marshall the assets. The objector is objecting to admitting the Lost Will. Matter submitted.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-23-2007 Continued To Jun-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
